author: m.kalinin
content: could you please explain why no restrictions at all could be bad?

author: nflaig
content: that way we can make sure that a builder with a certain version can't exist in the state before some future fork and you could add a specific onboarding conditions for that new builder type in `process_builder_deposit_request`

author: m.kalinin
content: do i understand correctly that this PR allows payload builders to have a prefix in `[0xB0, 0xBF]` range, but only `0xB0` prefix will be used to onboard builders at the fork?
